scope: Publishes peer-reviewed research in all fields of science and technology. Covers biology, chemistry, physics, earth sciences, medicine, and social sciences.
Focuses on biomedical research including disease biology, genomics, molecular medicine, drug discovery, clinical translation, and therapeutic development.
Covers new concepts in biological manipulation, agricultural biotechnology, biopharmaceuticals, biomaterials, bioprocessing, biosensors, and genomics.
Focuses on genetic variation and complex traits, functional genomics, epigenetics, structural variation, and population genetics.
Covers all aspects of cell biology including signalling, organelle function, cell division, cell death, cancer biology, and stem cells.
High-impact multidisciplinary journal publishing significant advances across biology, chemistry, physics, earth sciences, and other disciplines.
Covers new approaches to biological and chemical research including single-cell methods, imaging, sequencing, proteomics, and computational tools.
Open access journal publishing scientifically valid primary research from all areas of natural and clinical sciences.
Covers molecular and cellular biology research including gene regulation, signal transduction, cell cycle, cell death, and cancer biology.
Publishes research on the molecular and cellular mechanisms of cancer including oncogenes, tumour suppressors, cancer genomics, and therapeutic targets.
Covers leukemia, lymphoma, myeloma, and related hematological disorders including genetics, immunology, stem cells, and clinical treatment.
Covers gastroenterology and hepatology including gut microbiota, inflammatory bowel disease, liver disease, pancreatic cancer, and endoscopy.
Covers clinical and experimental neurology including neurodegeneration, stroke, epilepsy, pain, neuroinflammation, and neuroimaging.
Covers all aspects of blood research including coagulation, immune cells, stem cells, hematological malignancies, and transfusion medicine.
Covers molecular and cellular biology including chromatin, RNA biology, protein biology, cell signalling, developmental biology, and structural biology.
Focuses on molecular mechanisms of cell death including apoptosis, necroptosis, autophagy, pyroptosis, and their role in disease.
Covers clinical and experimental aspects of liver diseases including viral hepatitis, metabolic liver disease, liver cancer, and liver transplantation.
Covers all aspects of molecular oncology including oncogenes, tumour suppressors, cancer metabolism, metastasis, angiogenesis, and cancer immunotherapy.
Covers genomics and biology of genomes including genome sequencing, genome evolution, epigenomics, functional genomics, and single-cell genomics.
Covers translational medicine including biomarkers, clinical trials, drug delivery, regenerative medicine, and molecular diagnostics.
Covers bioinformatics and computational biology including sequence analysis, structural bioinformatics, systems biology, and machine learning in biology.
Covers all aspects of genome research including genome sequencing and annotation, transcriptomics, epigenomics, and comparative genomics.
Covers clinical oncology including cancer treatment trials, molecular targeted therapies, immunotherapy, and cancer prevention.
Covers molecular medicine including gene expression, cell signalling, disease mechanisms, biomarkers, and experimental therapeutics.
Covers molecular and cellular mechanisms in biology and medicine including protein function, cellular signalling, organelle biology, and disease models.
Describes datasets with high potential for reuse in all areas of science; covers data sharing, data quality, and metadata standards.
Focuses on precision oncology including molecular profiling, targeted therapies, liquid biopsy, immune profiling, and clinical genomics.
Covers genomic medicine including clinical genomics, rare disease genomics, pharmacogenomics, and implementation of genomic technologies.
Covers experimental and molecular medicine including cell biology, signalling pathways, gene therapy, and disease mechanisms.
Covers cell biology and related areas including stem cells, single-cell analysis, organoids, cancer biology, and molecular mechanisms.
Publishes significant advances across biological sciences including structural biology, biochemistry, physiology, and ecology.
Covers bone and mineral research including bone metabolism, osteoporosis, skeletal disease, bone-related cancers, and regenerative medicine.
Covers the science of aging including biological mechanisms of aging, age-related disease, longevity, interventions, and healthspan.
Covers gene therapy and nucleic acid medicine including viral vectors, CRISPR, RNA therapies, gene editing, and clinical gene therapy.
Covers immunity at mucosal surfaces including gut immunity, respiratory immunity, barrier function, mucosal vaccines, and microbiome-immune interactions.
Covers obesity research including adipose tissue biology, metabolic syndrome, weight management, bariatric surgery, and obesity-related disease.
Covers experimental pathology and disease mechanisms including histopathology, molecular pathology, biomarkers, and animal models.
Covers translational neuroscience and psychiatry including genetics, imaging, biomarkers, animal models, and new therapeutic approaches.
Covers clinical ophthalmology including retinal disease, glaucoma, corneal disorders, refractive surgery, and ocular inflammation.
Covers spinal cord injury and disease including rehabilitation, neuroprotection, spasticity management, and quality of life.
Covers human nutrition including dietary assessment, nutritional epidemiology, obesity, metabolic disease, and micronutrient research.
Covers human genetics and genomics including disease genetics, pharmacogenomics, epigenetics, and population genetics.
Covers evolutionary genetics including population genetics, quantitative genetics, ecological genetics, and conservation genetics.

journal_title: Journal of Exposure Science and Environmental Epidemiology
scope: Covers environmental health science including exposome research, environmental epidemiology, toxicology, and health risk assessment.
Covers behavioral pharmacology and neuropsychopharmacology including neurotransmitter systems, addiction, anxiety, and psychosis.
